'''lotawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgeless|judgeless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgeless|judgeless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lotawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotawithi|lotawithi]] || [[word:lotawiji|lotawiji]] || [[word:lotawishi|lotawishi]] || [[word:lotawiki|lotawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotawuthuthu|lotawuthuthu]] || [[word:lotawujuju|lotawujuju]] || [[word:lotawushushu|lotawushushu]] || [[word:lotawukuku|lotawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotawuthu|lotawuthu]] || [[word:lotawuju|lotawuju]] || [[word:lotawushu|lotawushu]] || [[word:lotawuku|lotawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotawufthuf|lotawufthuf]] || [[word:lotawufjuf|lotawufjuf]] || [[word:lotawufshuf|lotawufshuf]] || [[word:lotawufkuf|lotawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotawethe|lotawethe]] || [[word:lotaweje|lotaweje]] || [[word:lotaweshe|lotaweshe]] || [[word:lotaweke|lotaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotawothotho|lotawothotho]] || [[word:lotawojojo|lotawojojo]] || [[word:lotawoshosho|lotawoshosho]] || [[word:lotawokoko|lotawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotawotho|lotawotho]] || [[word:lotawojo|lotawojo]] || [[word:lotawosho|lotawosho]] || [[word:lotawoko|lotawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotawofthof|lotawofthof]] || [[word:lotawofjof|lotawofjof]] || [[word:lotawofshof|lotawofshof]] || [[word:lotawofkof|lotawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfthĂŻf|lotawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfjĂŻf|lotawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfshĂŻf|lotawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfkĂŻf|lotawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lotawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lotawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lotawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lotawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfthĂŻf|lotawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfjĂŻf|lotawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfshĂŻf|lotawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfkĂŻf|lotawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfthĂŻf|lotawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfjĂŻf|lotawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfshĂŻf|lotawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lotawĂŻfkĂŻf|lotawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotawĂŠthĂŠ|lotawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lotawĂŠjĂŠ|lotawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lotawĂŠshĂŠ|lotawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lotawĂŠkĂŠ|lotawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotawathatha|lotawathatha]] || [[word:lotawajaja|lotawajaja]] || [[word:lotawashasha|lotawashasha]] || [[word:lotawakaka|lotawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotawatha|lotawatha]] || [[word:lotawaja|lotawaja]] || [[word:lotawasha|lotawasha]] || [[word:lotawaka|lotawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotawafthaf|lotawafthaf]] || [[word:lotawafjaf|lotawafjaf]] || [[word:lotawafshaf|lotawafshaf]] || [[word:lotawafkaf|lotawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lotawasha|lotawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lotawshĂ«sha|lotawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lotawrosha|lotawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lotawmusha|lotawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lotawyasha|lotawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golotawnkshĂ«sha|golotawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golotawnkrosha|golotawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golotawnkmusha|golotawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golotawnkyasha|golotawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lotatawasha|lotatawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lotatawshĂ«sha|lotatawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lotatawrosha|lotatawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lotatawmusha|lotatawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lotatawyasha|lotatawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golotatawnkshĂ«sha|golotatawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golotatawnkrosha|golotatawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golotatawnkmusha|golotatawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golotatawnkyasha|golotatawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:letĂŠwasha|letĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:letĂŠwshĂ«sha|letĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:letĂŠwrosha|letĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:letĂŠwmusha|letĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:letĂŠwyasha|letĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goletĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|goletĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goletĂŠwnkrosha|goletĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goletĂŠwnkmusha|goletĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goletĂŠwnkyasha|goletĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lotfawasha|lotfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lotfawshĂ«sha|lotfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lotfawrosha|lotfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lotfawmusha|lotfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lotfawyasha|lotfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golotfawnkshĂ«sha|golotfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golotfawnkrosha|golotfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golotfawnkmusha|golotfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golotfawnkyasha|golotfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
